---
title: "South Park makes me really happy sometimes"
date: 2010-12-02
author: Jonathan Whitmore
draft: true
description: "A short playlist of two South Park YouTube clips guaranteed to make you smile, clocking in at under four minutes total."
categories: [personal, humor]
---

I've embedded a YouTube playlist that will play two videos back to back. I promise it's worth it to fully watch both videos.

Enjoy. (Total running time: under 4 minutes).
